title: Fertilizer Dosage Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for optimal fertilizer application rates based on crop needs, soil analysis, and application efficiency, following ISO 14051, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC guidelines.

inputs.label: Crop Type
inputs.businessContext: Determines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.

businessContext_i18n.en: Determines the nitrogen (N), phosphorus (P), and potassium (K) uptake coefficients from agronomic tables.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tarım tablolarından azot (N), fosfor (P) ve potasyum (K) alım katsayılarını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bestimmt die Aufnahmekoeffizienten für Stickstoff (N), Phosphor (P) und Kalium (K) aus agronomischen Tabellen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Détermine les coefficients d'absorption de l'azote (N), du phosphore (P) et du potassium (K) à partir des tables agronomiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Determina los coeficientes de absorción de nitrógeno (N), fósforo (P) y potasio (K) a partir de tablas agronómicas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يحدد معاملات امتصاص النيتروجين (N) والفوسفور (P) والبوتاسيوم (K) من الجداول الزراعية.

inputs.label: Target Yield
inputs.businessContext: Expected harvest per hectare, used to calculate total nutrient demand.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected harvest per hectare, used to calculate total nutrient demand.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hektar başına beklenen hasat, toplam besin talebini hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Ertrag pro Hektar, zur Berechnung des gesamten Nährstoffbedarfs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Récolte attendue par hectare, utilisée pour calculer la demande totale en nutriments.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cosecha esperada por hectárea, utilizada para calcular la demanda total de nutrientes.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحصاد المتوقع لكل هكتار، يُستخدم لحساب إجمالي الطلب على المغذيات.

inputs.label: Soil Nitrogen (N) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of N fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of N fertilizer needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprak testinden ölçülür; gerekli N gübresi miktarını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen durch Bodenuntersuchung; beeinflusst die benötigte N-Düngermenge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurée par analyse de sol ; influence la quantité d'engrais N nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medido mediante análisis de suelo; influye en la cantidad de fertilizante nitrogenado necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يُقاس من اختبار التربة؛ يؤثر على كمية سماد النيتروجين المطلوبة.

inputs.label: Soil Phosphorus (P) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of P fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of P fertilizer needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprak testinden ölçülür; gerekli P gübresi miktarını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen durch Bodenuntersuchung; beeinflusst die benötigte P-Düngermenge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurée par analyse de sol ; influence la quantité d'engrais P nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medido mediante análisis de suelo; influye en la cantidad de fertilizante fosforado necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يُقاس من اختبار التربة؛ يؤثر على كمية سماد الفوسفور المطلوبة.

inputs.label: Soil Potassium (K) Content
inputs.businessContext: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of K fertilizer needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured from soil test; influences the amount of K fertilizer needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toprak testinden ölçülür; gerekli K gübresi miktarını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen durch Bodenuntersuchung; beeinflusst die benötigte K-Düngermenge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurée par analyse de sol ; influence la quantité d'engrais K nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medido mediante análisis de suelo; influye en la cantidad de fertilizante potásico necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مقاسة من اختبار التربة؛ تؤثر على كمية سماد البوتاسيوم المطلوبة.

inputs.label: Application Efficiency Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of applied fertilizer that is actually taken up by the crop; affected by method, timing, and weather.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulanan gübrenin bitki tarafından alınan yüzdesi; yöntem, zamanlama ve hava koşullarından etkilenir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des ausgebrachten Düngers, der tatsächlich von der Kultur aufgenommen wird; beeinflusst durch Methode, Zeitpunkt und Wetter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de l'engrais appliqué réellement absorbé par la culture ; affecté par la méthode, le moment et les conditions météorologiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del fertilizante aplicado que es realmente absorbido por el cultivo; afectado por el método, el momento y el clima.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية للسماد المطبق الذي تمتصه المحصول فعليًا؛ تتأثر بالطريقة والتوقيت والطقس.

inputs.label: Nitrogen Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different sources have different N concentration and loss characteristics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different sources have different N concentration and loss characteristics.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Farklı kaynaklar farklı N konsantrasyonu ve kayıp özelliklerine sahiptir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verschiedene Quellen haben unterschiedliche N-Konzentrationen und Verlusteigenschaften.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différentes sources ont des concentrations en N et des caractéristiques de perte différentes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferentes fuentes tienen diferente concentración de N y características de pérdida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصادر المختلفة لها تركيز نيتروجين وخصائص فقدان مختلفة.

inputs.label: Phosphorus Fertilizer Type
inputs.businessContext: Different sources have different P concentration and solubility.

businessContext_i18n.en: Different sources have different P concentration and solubility.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Farklı kaynaklar farklı P konsantrasyonu ve çözünürlüğüne sahiptir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verschiedene Quellen haben unterschiedliche P-Konzentration und Löslichkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différentes sources ont des concentrations en P et des solubilités différentes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferentes fuentes tienen diferente concentración de P y solubilidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المصادر المختلفة لها تركيز فوسفور وذوبانية مختلفة.

rules.message: Soil nitrogen is high relative to target yield; consider reducing N application to avoid over-fertilization.
High rainfall forecast may reduce efficiency; consider split application or use of inhibitors.
Very dry soil; fertilizer may not dissolve properly. Consider irrigation or delayed application.

thresholds.message: Nitrogen application rate exceeds recommended limits for environmental safety.
Phosphorus application rate may cause runoff and eutrophication.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
